Tourism services demo data
==========================

This folder contains two worked simulated surveyframe demos:

- `tourism_services_demo.sframe`: an instrument for tourism-services research.
- `tourism_services_responses.csv`: 120 simulated respondent records.
- `surveyframe_input_types_demo.sframe`: a GUI-focused instrument covering all
  major surveyframe item types.
- `surveyframe_input_types_responses.csv`: 120 simulated responses for the
  input-types instrument.

The construct names are inspired by the article "Assessing the Effectiveness
of Digital Marketing in Enhancing Tourist Experiences and Satisfaction: A Study
of Thailand's Tourism Services" (Administrative Sciences, 2024,
doi:10.3390/admsci14110273). Item wording and responses are synthetic and are
included only to make package examples run without network access or private
data.

Use the tourism-services demo for scale scoring, reliability, reporting, and
SEM syntax examples. Use the input-types demo for builder, studio, dashboard,
and input-control coverage.
